summary: Customer testimonial from Shari in Ajax, Ontario about her horse Nougat Bar loving his Cavallo hoof boots for stoney forest trail rides, praising durability and drainage holes.
Blog post on horse-human communication and Limbic Resonance, citing the book 'A General Theory of Love' on non-verbal emotional connection between mammals.
Blog post on the National Forest Trails System Stewardship Act, a bipartisan bill to improve public access and address the trail maintenance backlog in US national forests.
Blog post on equine bodywork and balanced muscles, explaining how horses adapt to hide weakness and the 'onion layers' principle of treating built-up issues.
Blog post featuring ex-farrier Marc Ferrador's case for barefoot horses over horseshoes, positioning Cavallo hoof boots as the alternative to nailing metal into hooves.
Customer testimonial from Stephanie Moretz about her QH Ruby recovering from thrush and a nail crack, now riding barefoot with Cavallo boots and self-trimming.
Numbered guide listing the first ten steps to transitioning a horse to barefoot, covering reading resources, online groups, and natural hoof care management like turn-out and diet.
Blog post promoting Cavallo's non-boot summer products including saddle pads, fly masks, and the Cooler Chair for trail rides and competition season.
Blog post about PATH International's Volunteer of the Year Award 2015 and equine-assisted activities and therapies (EAAT) for people with various challenges.
Blog post announcing Cavallo unveiling a new hoof boot at the AETA 2015 trade show in Pennsylvania, introducing brand ambassadors Fran and Jack Levy.
Blog post on respectful groundwork horsemanship, outlining the three R's (Request, Response, Release) and five numbered handling exercises done without force.
Customer testimonial from Denise in Stafford Springs, CT about her Appy Kid using Cavallo Trek boots on gravel trail rides through mud, sand, and dirt roads.
